case_title: IVY KA MAN LIU VS. FERNANDO TOLAMA DURAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, IVY KA MAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURAN, FERNANDO TOLAMA $3,674.55 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,749.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED JUL-25-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, FERNANDO TOLAMA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OEX HEARING TAKEN OFF CALENDAR: PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF DEC-02-2019
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, FERNANDO TOLAMA HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-22-2021 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-08-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCT-17-19 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT. 506.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF IVY KA MAN LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FERNANDO TOLAMA DURAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATES IN OPEN COURT THAT UPON FURTHER INVESTIGATION HE HAS DETERMINED THAT HE DID SIGN AND DEPOSIT CHECK NUMBER 163 FOR THE AMOUNT OF $2000.00. DEFENDANT INFORMS THE COURT THAT THERE IS AN UPCOMING CRIMINAL HEARING AT 850 BRYANT ST. ADDRESSING THE SAME ISSUE AND IF JUDGMENT ON THAT AMOUNT COULD BE MADE AFTER THE UPCOMING CRIMINAL HEARING. THE COURT INFORMS PARTIES THAT A JUDGMENT COULD NOT BE SPLIT PENIDNG THE UPCOIMING HEARING AND ASKS THE PLAINTIFF IF SHE IS ACCEPTABLE TO A JUDMENT AMOUNT LESS THE $2000.00, WHICH SHE CAN ASK FOR IN RESTITUTION. PLAINTIFF IS AGREEABLE TO THIS REQUEST. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT: A PAYMENT OF 312.46 EVERY MONTH FOR 12 MONTHS POSTMARKED BEFORE THE 1ST OF THE MONTH. THE FIRST PAYMENT WILL BE ON JAN-01-2020 AND MAILED TO ADDRESS GIVEN. IF PAYMENT IS ON-TIME JUDGMENT CREDITOR/PLAINTIFF WILL NOT GARNISH OR PUT A LIEN ON PROPERTY, UNLESS A PAYMENT IS MISSED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE.PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR IVY KA MAN LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FERNANDO TOLAMA DURAN IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2019 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-12-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. JUDGMENT CREDITOR IVY KA MAN LIU IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR FERNANDO TOLAMA DURAN IS NOT PRESENT. LITIGANTS HAVE ACTIVE STAY AWAY IN PLACE (ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
(SC-223) DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, IVY KA MAN AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, FERNANDO TOLAMA
(SC-225) ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT [X] THE COURT ORDER [X] THE PAYMENT ORDER REFERRED TO [X] IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE.
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION OFF CALENDAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,754.86 FILED BY LIU, IVY KA MAN AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, FERNANDO TOLAMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO OCT-17-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IVY KA MAN LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FERNANDO TOLAMA DURAN IS PRESENT. ESPERANZA DURAN & JULIANA SAUCEDO TESTIFY ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS REVIEWED IN OPEN COURT AND RETURNED. TELEPHONE CALL IS MADE TO US BANK CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE RUBY (NO LAST NAME GIVEN) ON BEHALF OF THE PALAINTIFF (ACCOUNT HOLDER) TO SEE IF THE REPRESENTATIVE CAN TELL WHO ENDORSED CHECK NUMBER 163 FOR THE AMOUNT OF $2000. REPRESENTATIVE STATES THAT THE SIGNATURE IS NOT LEGIBLE AND APPEARES TO BE ALTERED. COURT DEMANDS THAT US BANK EMAIL A COPY BE OF THE CASHED CHECK TO THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF PROVIDES THE HER EMAIL ADDRESS TO US BANK REPRESENTATIVE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: NOV-22-2019 (FEE FOR SERVICE:$70.00) AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, FERNANDO TOLAMA
ORDER BENCH LETTER ISSUED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DURAN, FERNANDO TOLAMA HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
